Description:
Ballistics of the 85×629mmR UO-365K HE-Frag shot fired from field gun D-44, tank gun D-5, ZiS-S-53, based on the ballistics of the anti-aircraft gun M1939 (52-K). 

The ammo and the D-44 gun was produced with improvement in the PRC as the WB014P, WB024P high-explosive fragmentation round, fired from the Type 56 85mm towed gun. Also employed from the domestic 85mm tank gun on the Type 62 (WZ131) light tank, modified from the ZiS-S-53, chiefly distinguished with the addition of a fume extractor.

Charge Zh-365:
Propellant		Mass	Grain	Remark
Pyroxylin		12%	18/1-42	Tubular, 1.8mm web, 420mm long. Improves ignition uniformity.
Pyroxylin		88%	14/7	7-perforated.

The entry may be manipulated to represent the ballistics for the following cases (Uncheck "Constrain Design"):

Shot		Projectile		Mass	Tvl.	Chg.	C.V.	M.V.		Type
				kg	mm	kg	L	m/s
UO-365K		O-365K		9.54	3592	2.60	3.80	793 (785)		HE-Frag (PD)     
OU-365		O-365		9.20	N/A	2.60	3.80	800 (792)		AA-Frag (TF)
UBR-365(K)		BR-365(K)		9.20	3587	2.63	3.94	800 (792)		APBCHE-T
UBR-365(K)		BR-365(K)		9.20	3587	2.63	3.94	800 (792)		APHE-T

Nominal performance given for weapon with a fresh barrel. Values in parenthesis applies to weapon of medium-worn barrels, from KS-19 manuals.
Breech Pressure:			2550 kgf/cm² (copper-crusher gauge, converts to 279.8 MPa piezo)

Parameters of the Weapon (D-44):
Gun Length:			4685 mm (incl. breech and muzzle device)
Barrel Length:			4145 mm
Chamber Length:			652 mm (breech to start of rifling)
			553 mm (propellant volume)

References:
- 《火炮内弹道计算手册》王连荣，张佩勤，国防工业出版社，1987
- 《国产火炮手册》兵器工业部第二管理局，1982
- "85-мм дивизионная пушка Д-44: Руководство службы". Министерство обороны СССР, Военное издательство. Москва, 1981.
